whatIs.question: What is G9Experts?
whatIs.answer: G9Experts is an online expert consultation platform where users can connect with verified professionals for advice across personal, professional, business, legal, health, education, finance, property, astrology, relationship, and lifestyle topics.

talkOnline.question: How can I talk to an expert online?
talkOnline.answer: Choose a category, browse verified expert profiles, and start an online consultation by chat or call from the G9Experts user app.

verified.question: Are experts on G9Experts verified?
verified.answer: G9Experts highlights verified expert profiles so users can review professional details, ratings, and consultation options before connecting.

instant.question: Can I chat or call experts instantly?
instant.answer: Yes. Available experts can be reached through instant chat or call consultation, depending on their current availability and pricing setup.

wallet.question: How does wallet payment work?
wallet.answer: Users can add balance to the secure G9Experts wallet and pay for eligible chat, call, or service consultations through wallet deduction.

categories.question: Which categories are available on G9Experts?
categories.answer: G9Experts supports multiple consultation categories including legal, health, astrology, fitness, business, career, finance, property, relationship, education, parenting, and more as available on the platform.

availability.question: Is G9Experts available 24/7?
availability.answer: Users can browse the platform anytime. Expert availability for chat or call depends on each verified professional's live status and schedule.

choose.question: How do I choose the right expert?
choose.answer: Compare expert profiles, categories, services, ratings, reviews, pricing, and availability to choose the professional who best matches your consultation need.

faq.title: Popular Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before connecting with verified experts.
faq.cta: Still have questions? Start chatting with an expert now.
faq.q1: Can I talk to a verified expert instantly?
faq.a1: Yes. You can choose chat or call and connect with available verified experts in just a few taps.
faq.q2: How does per-minute chat or call consultation work?
faq.a2: Your wallet is charged based on the expert's per-minute rate while the consultation is active.
faq.q3: Can I choose an expert by category?
faq.a3: Yes. Browse categories like legal, health, career, astrology, finance, business, and more.
faq.q4: Is my chat with the expert private and secure?
faq.a4: Consultations are designed for private one-to-one guidance between you and the selected expert.
faq.q5: How do I recharge my wallet before consultation?
faq.a5: Open your wallet, add balance, and start a chat or call once your balance is ready.
faq.q6: Can I get career, legal, health, astrology, or business advice?
faq.a6: Yes. G9 Experts supports multiple professional categories for instant guidance.
faq.q7: How are experts verified on G9 Experts?
faq.a7: Expert profiles include trust signals, category details, and review information to help users decide.
faq.q8: Can I see expert ratings and reviews before connecting?
faq.a8: Yes. Ratings, reviews, and profile details help you compare experts before starting.
faq.q9: What happens if my wallet balance is low?
faq.a9: You can recharge your wallet before or during the consultation flow to continue smoothly.
faq.q10: Can I follow an expert for future consultation?
faq.a10: Yes. Following an expert makes it easier to find them again for future guidance.

reviewTrust.title: Trusted Experience

privacy.label: Legal
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Learn how G9 Experts collects, uses, stores, and protects your personal information while providing secure expert consultation services.
privacy.description: Read the G9 Experts Privacy Policy covering personal information, consultation data, payments, cookies, permissions, and your privacy rights.
privacy.keywords: G9 Experts privacy policy, user privacy, data protection, secure consultation, wallet privacy

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.text: We collect only the information necessary to provide our services.

account.title: Account Information
account.text: Name, email address, mobile number, profile details, and login credentials.

consultation.title: Consultation Data
consultation.text: Booking history, chat and call activity, wallet transactions, and service usage.

technical.title: Technical Information
technical.text: Device, browser, IP address, cookies, and usage analytics to improve platform security and performance.

usage.title: How We Use Your Information
usage.text: Your information is used only to operate and improve G9 Experts.

services.title: Provide Services
services.text: Create your account, connect you with experts, process bookings, and manage wallet payments.

security.title: Security & Fraud Prevention
security.text: Protect accounts, detect suspicious activity, and maintain platform safety.

communication.title: Notifications
communication.text: Send OTPs, payment updates, booking reminders, and important account notifications.

sharing.title: Information Sharing
sharing.text: Your personal information is never sold.

partners.title: Trusted Partners
partners.text: Information may be shared with payment gateways and service providers only when required to deliver services.

legal.title: Legal Compliance
legal.text: Information may be disclosed if required by applicable law or government authorities.

security.title: Data Protection
security.text: We apply industry-standard security practices to protect your information.

encryption.title: Secure Systems
encryption.text: Encrypted communication, secure authentication, and protected servers help safeguard your data.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.text: Information is retained only as long as necessary for legal, security, and business purposes.

rights.title: Your Privacy Rights
rights.text: You remain in control of your personal information.

manage.title: Manage Your Account
manage.text: You may update or correct your profile information through your account or by contacting support.

permissions.title: Permissions & Cookies
permissions.text: You can manage cookies, notifications, location, microphone, and camera permissions through your device settings.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.text: If you have any privacy-related questions or requests, please contact our support team.

terms.label: Legal
terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.subtitle: Please read these Terms & Conditions carefully before using G9 Experts. By accessing or using the platform, you agree to comply with these terms.
terms.description: Read the G9 Experts Terms & Conditions covering platform usage, payments, consultation policies, user responsibilities, expert obligations, and account rules.
terms.keywords: G9 Experts terms, terms and conditions, consultation policy, wallet terms, user agreement

usage.title: Platform Usage
usage.text: Using G9 Experts means you agree to follow these Terms while accessing any consultation or online service.

eligibility.title: Eligibility
eligibility.text: Users should provide accurate information and meet the platform eligibility requirements before creating an account.

account.title: Account Security
account.text: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and activities performed using your account.

expertPlatform.title: Platform Nature
expertPlatform.text: G9 Experts is a technology platform connecting users with independent experts and does not itself provide professional consultation.

payments.title: Payments & Wallet
payments.text: Consultation charges, wallet transactions, and supported payment methods are governed by these Terms.

wallet.title: Wallet Usage
wallet.text: Wallet balance may be used only for eligible services available on the platform.

consultationFees.title: Consultation Charges
consultationFees.text: Experts independently decide their consultation pricing and charges are displayed before starting a session.

refunds.title: Refund Policy
refunds.text: Refund requests are handled according to the applicable Refund & Cancellation Policy.

conduct.title: Acceptable Conduct
conduct.text: Users and experts must maintain respectful communication and comply with all applicable laws.

respect.title: Respectful Behaviour
respect.text: Harassment, abusive language, threats, or offensive behaviour are strictly prohibited.

misuse.title: No Platform Misuse
misuse.text: Users must not attempt unauthorized access, fraud, spam, impersonation, or any activity that disrupts platform operations.

content.title: User Content
content.text: Uploaded content should be lawful, original, and must not violate intellectual property or community guidelines.

liability.title: Liability & Disclaimer
liability.text: The platform facilitates consultations but does not guarantee consultation outcomes.

platformRole.title: Platform Responsibility
platformRole.text: G9 Experts only provides the technology platform and communication infrastructure.

expertResponsibility.title: Expert Responsibility
expertResponsibility.text: Experts remain solely responsible for the advice, consultation, and services they provide.

serviceAvailability.title: Service Availability
serviceAvailability.text: Platform availability may occasionally be interrupted due to maintenance, technical issues, or circumstances beyond reasonable control.

termination.title: Account Suspension & Updates
termination.text: Accounts violating these Terms may be suspended or terminated without prior notice where necessary.

accountSuspension.title: Account Suspension
accountSuspension.text: Accounts involved in fraud, abuse, illegal activity, or policy violations may be restricted or permanently terminated.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.text: These Terms may be updated periodically. Continued use of the platform indicates acceptance of revised Terms.

contact.title: Need Assistance?
contact.text: If you have questions regarding these Terms & Conditions, please contact our support team.

refundCancellation.label: Legal
refundCancellation.title: Refund & Cancellation Policy
refundCancellation.subtitle: Understand how refunds, cancellations, wallet credits, payment disputes, and failed transactions are handled on G9 Experts.
refundCancellation.description: Read the G9 Experts Refund & Cancellation Policy covering refund eligibility, cancellations, wallet refunds, payment failures, duplicate transactions, and customer support.
refundCancellation.keywords: refund policy, cancellation policy, wallet refund, Razorpay refund, G9 Experts

overview.title: Policy Overview
overview.text: This policy explains how G9 Experts handles cancellations, refunds, wallet credits, payment failures, and refund requests.

policyPurpose.title: Purpose
policyPurpose.text: Our goal is to provide a fair, transparent, and legally compliant refund process for all users and experts.

eligibility.title: Applicability
eligibility.text: This policy applies to website users, mobile app users, experts, wallet transactions, Razorpay payments, and future payment methods.

paymentMethods.title: Payment Methods
paymentMethods.text: Payments may be made using UPI, Credit Card, Debit Card, Net Banking, Razorpay, or Wallet Balance.

refunds.title: Refund Eligibility
refunds.text: Refunds are reviewed individually based on the circumstances of each transaction.

eligibleRefunds.title: Eligible Refunds
eligibleRefunds.text: Refunds may be approved for verified platform failures, duplicate payments, payment errors, or other approved situations.

nonRefundable.title: Non-Refundable Cases
nonRefundable.text: Refunds are generally not available after consultations are completed, for opinion disagreements, or issues caused by user devices or internet.

walletRefunds.title: Wallet Refunds
walletRefunds.text: Approved refunds may be credited to the original payment method or your G9 Experts Wallet, depending on the transaction.

cancellations.title: Cancellation Policy
cancellations.text: Cancellation rules depend on when the consultation is cancelled.

userCancellation.title: User Cancellation
userCancellation.text: Users may cancel before the consultation begins, subject to the cancellation rules shown on the platform.

expertCancellation.title: Expert Cancellation
expertCancellation.text: If an expert cancels a confirmed consultation, users may receive a refund or be offered another available expert.

technicalFailure.title: Technical Issues
technicalFailure.text: Verified platform-related technical failures may qualify for refunds after review.

process.title: Refund Process
process.text: Every refund request is carefully reviewed before a decision is made.

refundRequest.title: Request Submission
refundRequest.text: Provide your registered details, transaction ID, consultation information, and supporting evidence when requesting a refund.

reviewProcess.title: Review Process
reviewProcess.text: We review payment records, consultation logs, wallet history, technical reports, and other relevant information.

timeline.title: Processing Time
timeline.text: Approved refunds are generally initiated within 7 working days, depending on banking and payment provider timelines.

important.title: Important Information
important.text: Additional rules apply to payment disputes, duplicate transactions, and fraud prevention.

duplicatePayments.title: Duplicate Payments
duplicatePayments.text: Verified duplicate payments will be reviewed and excess amounts refunded.

fraudProtection.title: Fraud Prevention
fraudProtection.text: Fraudulent refund requests, false claims, or payment abuse may lead to account restrictions or termination.

contactSupport.title: Need Help?
contactSupport.text: For refund-related questions or requests, please contact the G9 Experts Support Team.

faqs.title: Common Questions
faqs.text: Use these answers to understand the platform before connecting with a verified expert.

instantExpert.question: Can I talk to a verified expert instantly?
instantExpert.answer: Yes. Available experts can be contacted through secure chat or call depending on their status, pricing, and consultation mode.

perMinute.question: How does per-minute chat or call consultation work?

chooseCategory.question: Can I choose an expert by category?

privateChat.question: Is my chat with the expert private and secure?
privateChat.answer: Consultations are designed to happen inside secure platform workflows.

rechargeWallet.question: How do I recharge my wallet before consultation?
rechargeWallet.answer: Go to the wallet page, enter an amount, and complete payment through the available gateway.

lowBalance.question: What happens if my wallet balance is low?
lowBalance.answer: You may be prompted to recharge before starting or continuing a paid consultation.

expertsJoin.question: Can experts join G9 Experts?
expertsJoin.answer: Yes. Professionals can register, complete profile details, and follow platform guidelines.

conduct.title: Code of Conduct
conduct.text: Experts should provide clear, respectful, honest, and category-appropriate guidance.

items.respect: Use respectful language and avoid misleading claims.
items.expertise: Stay within your expertise and explain limitations clearly.
items.noOffPlatform: Do not request off-platform payments or unsafe personal information.
items.professional: Keep consultation communication professional and solution-focused.

items.photo: Add a clear profile photo, category, expertise, education, and experience.
items.summary: Write a simple professional summary users can understand quickly.
items.pricing: Set transparent chat, call, and service pricing where available.
items.availability: Keep availability and language preferences accurate.

accuracy.title: Accuracy
accuracy.text: Keep your profile, pricing, and service details current.

communication.title: Communication
communication.text: Respond clearly, avoid jargon, and summarize practical next steps.

walletRecharge.question: My wallet recharge is not visible. What should I do?
walletRecharge.answer: Check transaction status and wait briefly for confirmation. If it still does not update, contact support with payment details.

cannotStart.question: I cannot start chat or call.
cannotStart.answer: Confirm login status, wallet balance, internet connectivity, and expert availability.

reportIssue.question: How do I report an expert or consultation issue?
reportIssue.answer: Share the consultation details, expert profile, and issue summary through support.

onboarding.question: Can experts get onboarding help?
onboarding.answer: Yes. Experts can use the guidelines, earnings model page, and support center for onboarding help.

main.title: Still need help?
main.text: Use the support center to get the right assistance for your account, payment, or consultation issue.

testimonials.title: What Users Say
testimonials.subtitle: Thousands of users trust G9 Experts for instant professional guidance.

ritika.name: Ritika Sharma
ritika.review: I connected with a career expert within minutes and got clear guidance for interview prep. The chat felt professional and useful.

amit.name: Amit Verma
amit.review: The lawyer consultation saved me a lot of time. I received a fast response and the advice was explained in simple steps.

neha.name: Neha Kapoor
neha.review: I needed quick health guidance late evening. The verified doctor responded calmly and helped me understand what to do next.

karan.name: Karan Malhotra
karan.review: For a business decision, the expert call was direct and practical. It felt convenient to speak with someone verified so quickly.

priya.name: Priya Nair
priya.review: The finance expert helped me compare options without pressure. I liked the trust signals and the response was very quick.

mohit.name: Mohit Bansal
mohit.review: I used instant chat for fitness guidance and got a realistic plan. The expert understood my schedule and kept the advice simple.

ananya.name: Ananya Singh
ananya.review: The career consultation helped me choose a better path after graduation. It was easy to connect and the expert was patient.

sahil.name: Sahil Mehta
sahil.review: I booked a quick call for pricing strategy. The consultant gave useful points I could apply the same day.

farah.name: Farah Khan
farah.review: I got legal and payment advice for a freelance contract. The verified expert made the process feel safe and convenient.

dev.name: Dev Patel
dev.review: The astrologer call started quickly and the guidance was balanced. I liked that everything happened inside one clean platform.

isha.name: Isha Arora
isha.review: A short call helped me decide the right next step for a family health concern. The experience felt private and reliable.

rohan.name: Rohan Gupta
rohan.review: I needed urgent advice before a vendor meeting. The expert joined fast and gave clear, practical guidance without wasting time.
